message:
beads sync: close bd-dyh3u (statmount/listmount + finit_module + quotactl_fd + map_shadow_stack + bpf + kexec_load + kexec_file_load shipped)

Flush the JSONL state for bd-dyh3u, which closed in commit 53f7ee45
("feat(abi): port statmount/listmount + finit_module + quotactl_fd +
map_shadow_stack + bpf + kexec_load + kexec_file_load (bd-dyh3u)") but
the .beads/issues.jsonl row still showed status=open until now.

The new row preserves the long description verbatim and adds:
  status: open -> closed
  updated_at: 2026-04-26T17:18:28.139183489Z
  closed_at:  2026-04-26T17:18:28.136792663Z
  close_reason: "shipped: 8 modern Linux syscall wrappers (statmount,
    listmount, finit_module, quotactl_fd, map_shadow_stack, bpf,
    kexec_load, kexec_file_load) + 10 abi tests covering NULL guards
    + privilege/kernel fallbacks"

br sync --flush-only style commit; no other beads touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
